title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Tata Elxsi Global Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Tata Elxsi Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Tata Elxsi Global Group in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Tata Elxsi Global Group:
Tata Elxsi Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Elxsi Global Group!
